title: Earned Sick Time — Massachusetts Attorney General's Fair Labor Division
description: MA Attorney General's Office page summarizing the earned sick time law (G.L. c.149 §§148C–148D): accrual (1 hour per 30 worked, up to 40 hours/year), paid vs. unpaid by employer size (11+ employees = paid), permitted uses (illness, injury, routine appointments, domestic violence, and pregnancy loss as of Nov 21 2024), employer notification/documentation rules, and posting obligations.

source.publisher: Massachusetts Office of the Attorney General — Fair Labor Division

notes: Statute G.L. c.149 §§148C–148D; regulations 940 CMR 33.00. Employers with <11 employees provide UNPAID sick time. Documentation may be requested only in limited circumstances (e.g. 3+ consecutive missed workdays). Complaints to the AG Fair Labor Division: (617) 727-3465.
